ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the company belongs to */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the company's CEO */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Company's annual revenue */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "market_share" REAL /* The company's market share in its sector */,
  "website" TEXT /* The company's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The company's contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* The company's contact email */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* The end date of the company's fiscal year */,
  "rating" REAL /* A rating or score for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sector */,
  "market_size" REAL /* The total market size of the sector */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* The annual growth rate of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consulting" (
  "consulting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consulting company */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "number_of_clients" INTEGER /* Number of clients the company serves */,
  "services_offered" TEXT /* List of services offered by the company */,
  "client_industries" TEXT /* Industries of the company's clients */,
  "client_size" TEXT /* Size of the company's client base */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consulting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consulting_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fmcg" (
  "fmcg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FMCG company */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "product_categories" TEXT /* Categories of products offered by the company */,
  "distribution_network" TEXT /* Description of the company's distribution network */,
  "product_count" INTEGER /* Number of products offered by the company */,
  "distribution_channels" TEXT /* Channels through which the company distributes its products */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fmcg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fmcg_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software company */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "product_list" TEXT /* List of software products offered by the company */,
  "research_and_development" TEXT /* Information about the company's research and development efforts */,
  "platforms_supported" TEXT /* Platforms on which the company's software is supported */,
  "customer_support" TEXT /* Type of customer support offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "finance" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each finance company */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "services_offered" TEXT /* Financial services offered by the company */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "products_offered" TEXT /* Specific financial products offered */,
  "customer_base" TEXT /* Size and type of the customer base */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_finance_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics company */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "data_solutions" TEXT /* Data analytics solutions offered by the company */,
  "client_list" TEXT /* List of notable clients */,
  "data_sources" TEXT /* Types of data sources used in the analytics solutions */,
  "industries_served" TEXT /* Industries served by the company's analytics solutions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_research" (
  "research_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market research entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "market_trends" TEXT /* Market trends relevant to the company */,
  "consumer_behavior" TEXT /* Consumer behavior insights related to the company */,
  "research_source" TEXT /* Source of the market research data */,
  "research_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the market research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_research_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "financial_year" INTEGER /* The financial year the report pertains to */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue for the financial year */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit for the financial year */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the financial year */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "equity" REAL /* Total equity of the company */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow for the financial year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers on the platform */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate on the platform */,
  "post_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts made by the company on the platform */,
  "average_engagement" REAL /* Average engagement rate for posts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "company_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first company in the collaboration */,
  "company_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second company in the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborative project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaborative project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaborative project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the collaborative project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_company_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("company_id_1") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_company_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("company_id_2") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within their organization */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the company data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the company data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
